system.notes:
Abilities

  • Furious Rake: Twice per Combat Turn, at the end of any enemy’s Action Phase, the dragon can use its Claw attack.
  • Tail: When the dragon damages a target with their Tail attack, they can deliver a toxin through their stinger with a Power of 12. The target must make a toxin resistance test using Body + Willpower. If the target fails, reduce the Power of the toxin by their hits. The target takes Physical damage equal to the remaining Power of the toxin.

Traits

  • Physical, Toxin Resistance:
  • Apex Predator: Can’t gain Frightened status.
  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Ultrasound, Vision Magnification:
  • Dual Natured: Dragons always exist on both the
  • astral and physical planes, and can interact with:
  • anything on either plane. Their Armor applies to:
  • attacks from both the physical and astral planes.:
  • Unchained: If the dragon is under an effect that they
  • roll at the end of the Combat Turn or their Action:
  • Phase to end, they instead roll at the start of their:
  • Action Phase.:
